mapper.select: SELECT photo, pid, birthday, uuid, hiredate, email, remark, tag, address, description FROM GAS_WORKER WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.pid, d.uuid, d.sex, d.photo, d.birthday, d.school, d.degree, d.tel, d.address, d.email, d.job, d.remark, d.description, d.hiredate, d.tag, d.recommended, d.status, d.create_time as createTime, md.id AS deptId, sd.dept_sub_id AS subId FROM GAS_WORKER d LEFT JOIN MEDICAL_DEPT_SUB_AND_WORKER sd ON sd.worker_id = d.id LEFT JOIN MEDICAL_DEPT_SUB s ON sd.dept_sub_id = s.id LEFT JOIN MEDICAL_DEPT md ON s.dept_id = md.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.pid AS pid, d.uuid AS uuid, d.sex AS sex, d.birthday AS birthday, d.school AS school, d.degree AS degree, d.tel AS tel, d.address AS address, d.email AS email, d.job AS job, d.remark AS remark, d.description AS description, d.hiredate AS hiredate, d.tag AS tag, d.recommended AS recommended, d.status AS status, md.id AS deptId, md.name AS deptName, sd.dept_sub_id AS subId FROM GAS_WORKER d LEFT JOIN MEDICAL_DEPT_SUB_AND_WORKER sd ON sd.worker_id = d.id LEFT JOIN MEDICAL_DEPT_SUB s ON sd.dept_sub_id = s.id LEFT JOIN MEDICAL_DEPT md ON s.dept_id = md.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GAS_WORKER (id, name, pid, uuid, sex, photo, birthday, school, degree, tel, address, email, job, remark, description, hiredate, tag, recommended, status, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{pid}, #{uuid}, #{sex}, #{photo}, #{birthday}, #{school}, #{degree}, #{tel}, #{address}, #{email}, #{job}, #{remark}, #{description}, #{hiredate}, #{tag}, #{recommended}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE GAS_WORKER SET
name = #{name},
pid = #{pid},
uuid = #{uuid},
sex = #{sex},
photo = #{photo},
birthday = #{birthday},
school = #{school},
degree = #{degree},
tel = #{tel},
address = #{address},
email = #{email},
job = #{job},
remark = #{remark},
description = #{description},
hiredate = #{hiredate},
tag = #{tag},
recommended = #{recommended},
status = #{status},
id = #{id} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM GAS_WORKER WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT w.id AS id, w.name AS name, w.sex AS sex, w.tel AS tel FROM GAS_WORKER w LEFT JOIN MEDICAL_DEPT_SUB_AND_WORKER sw ON w.id = sw.worker_id WHERE sw.dept_sub_id = #{deptSubId} AND w.status = 1
SELECT id, name FROM GAS_WORKER WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY name
